response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Partially matched. Song 1 ('ふれ・あて・す！') had no lyrics provided in the reference, requiring 100% manual transcription and translation. Song 2 ('Watch me!') matched the reference lyrics perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the reference lyrics for Song 2 while performing manual transcription for Song 1 and the spoken dialogue. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles were tightly wrapped around vocal events to preserve pacing, with aggressive truncation applied to fast-paced lines to prevent delays.

subtitles.original: 元気な キラッと スマイル アイドル
subtitles.english: An energetic, sparkling smile idol!

subtitles.original: 毎日もっと楽しくしたい
subtitles.english: I want to make every day even more fun!

subtitles.original: どうよ？ go with アドベンチャー
subtitles.english: How about that? Go with adventure!

subtitles.original: ひらひらスカートも
subtitles.english: Even this fluttering skirt...

subtitles.original: ちゃんと着こなせるんだよ
subtitles.english: I can wear it perfectly, you know!

subtitles.original: だからもっともっと
subtitles.english: So, more and more,

subtitles.original: 気になってもいいよ
subtitles.english: it's okay to fall for me!

subtitles.original: 一緒に 大空に飛び立とう
subtitles.english: Let's fly away together into the great big sky!

subtitles.original: ひかれ！
subtitles.english: Shine!

subtitles.original: どんな輝きの中も 強いきらめき
subtitles.english: Even in any kind of brightness, a strong sparkle...

subtitles.original: 君に届いているかな？
subtitles.english: I wonder if it's reaching you?

subtitles.original: 1ミリでも伝わればいい
subtitles.english: Even if only a millimeter gets through, that's fine!

subtitles.original: ゴー！ チャージ！ チャレンジ！ 全力アクセル！
subtitles.english: Go! Charge! Challenge! Full-throttle accelerator!

subtitles.original: 頑張る君へ
subtitles.english: To you, who are doing your best,

subtitles.original: 一番乗りのスマイルを送る スバルチャンネル
subtitles.english: sending my first-arrival smile on the Subaru Channel!

subtitles.original: エブリデイ 悩んで みんなで
subtitles.english: Every day, let's face our worries together!

subtitles.original: ブルーな気持ちに ズバッと駆けつけ お助けしちゃう ヒーロー
subtitles.english: Rushing right over to your blue feelings, a hero to save the day!

subtitles.original: 弱いハートじゃいられないから つよつよでいきましょう
subtitles.english: Because we can't stay weak-hearted, let's go with super strength!

subtitles.original: ハラハラ波しぶき
subtitles.english: Slightly nervous wave splashes...

subtitles.original: ドキドキのときめきたい
subtitles.english: I want to feel a heart-pounding excitement!

subtitles.original: いつでもおいでよ 一年中パラダイス
subtitles.english: Come over anytime, a paradise all year round!

subtitles.original: どかんと
subtitles.english: With a bang...

subtitles.original: 曇り空 吹き飛ばそう
subtitles.english: let's blow away the cloudy skies!

subtitles.original: あがれ！
subtitles.english: Rise!

subtitles.original: サマー！ どんな暗闇の中も 眩しく照らす
subtitles.english: Summer! Brightly shining through any darkness...

subtitles.original: 君に見つけてもらえたら
subtitles.english: If you could find me,

subtitles.original: それだけでも 運命なんだ
subtitles.english: just that alone is destiny!

subtitles.original: もっと ずっと 道は続いていく 夢に向かって
subtitles.english: Our path continues on, further and further, towards our dreams!

subtitles.original: 一緒に来てくれるかな？ その手とって 走れ
subtitles.english: Will you come along with me? Take my hand and run!

subtitles.original: 連れていくよ みんなで
subtitles.english: I'll take you there, everyone together!

subtitles.original: かがやく 恥ずかしいけれど
subtitles.english: Shining, though it's a bit embarrassing,

subtitles.original: 伝えたい思い
subtitles.english: the feelings I want to convey...

subtitles.original: 今なら言える
subtitles.english: now I can say them!

subtitles.original: 君のエールが力になるよ
subtitles.english: Your cheers give me strength!

subtitles.original: いつも元気を分けてくれて
subtitles.english: Always sharing your energy with me,

subtitles.original: 頑張っていけるんだ 笑って過ごせるんだ
subtitles.english: I can keep doing my best, and spend my days smiling!

subtitles.original: 本当に
subtitles.english: Truly,

subtitles.original: ありがとうの気持ちを
subtitles.english: this feeling of gratitude,

subtitles.original: 歌えたら
subtitles.english: if I can sing it...

subtitles.original: シャイン！
subtitles.english: Shine!

subtitles.original: どんな輝きの中も
subtitles.english: Even in any kind of brightness,

subtitles.original: 強いきらめき
subtitles.english: a strong sparkle...

subtitles.original: 君に届いているかな？
subtitles.english: I wonder if it's reaching you?

subtitles.original: 1ミリでも伝わればいい
subtitles.english: Even if only a millimeter gets through, that's fine!

subtitles.original: もっと ずっと 道は続いていく 夢に向かって
subtitles.english: Our path continues on, further and further, towards our dreams!

subtitles.original: 一緒に来てくれるかな？ その手とって 走れ
subtitles.english: Will you come along with me? Take my hand and run!

subtitles.original: 連れていくよ みんなで
subtitles.english: I'll take you there, everyone together!

subtitles.original: 君と駆ける スバル
subtitles.english: Running with you, Subaru!

subtitles.original: 大空スバル 7周年ライブ！始まる、始まるー！
subtitles.english: Oozora Subaru's 7th Anniversary Live! It's starting, it's starting!

subtitles.original: いつも迷惑ばかりかけるけど
subtitles.english: I always end up causing trouble for you,

subtitles.original: いつも散々困らせちゃうけど
subtitles.english: I always end up making things so difficult,

subtitles.original: それでも隣にいてくれる
subtitles.english: but still, you stay by my side,

subtitles.original: 君のそばにずっと
subtitles.english: always right here with you.

subtitles.original: 曖昧な言葉じゃ
subtitles.english: With vague words,

subtitles.original: 真面目な君には伝わらない
subtitles.english: I can't get through to serious you,

subtitles.original: 頑丈なそのハートを 覗いてみたい
subtitles.english: I want to peek inside your strong heart,

subtitles.original: 融かしてみたい
subtitles.english: I want to melt it.

subtitles.original: そんな時こんな魔法はどうかな？
subtitles.english: How about this kind of magic for times like this?

subtitles.original: 何が出るかな？
subtitles.english: What will come out?

subtitles.original: やっちゃえ！
subtitles.english: Let's do it!

subtitles.original: せーの！
subtitles.english: Ready, set!

subtitles.original: try try try
subtitles.english: Try, try, try!

subtitles.original: あやふやだって
subtitles.english: Even if it's uncertain,

subtitles.original: いいの！いいの！
subtitles.english: it's okay! It's okay!

subtitles.original: which one to pick
subtitles.english: Which one to pick,

subtitles.original: watch me do magic
subtitles.english: watch me do magic,

subtitles.original: あらら想像以上の展開
subtitles.english: oh, this is turning out better than I imagined,

subtitles.original: もう止められないのよ
subtitles.english: I can't stop now.

subtitles.original: ごめんなさい
subtitles.english: Sorry,

subtitles.original: 溢れる想いで空回り
subtitles.english: my overflowing feelings are spinning out of control,

subtitles.original: 振りかけるhappyなイメージ
subtitles.english: sprinkling happy images around,

subtitles.original: で振り回すfancyなマジック
subtitles.english: and casting fancy magic everywhere!

subtitles.original: また君に
subtitles.english: To you again...
